## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on content strategy and review the first pillar article for Tribe AI's thought leadership campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/Ee1_QSGNFJj4Ck2QDm6rXzz_FHjiZ6ZU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [First pillar article (5000+ words) completed, ready for Jackie's review and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/Ee1_QSGNFJj4Ck2QDm6rXzz_FHjiZ6ZU?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Content strategy aims to create pillar pieces that spawn multiple SEO-focused articles](https://fathom.video/share/Ee1_QSGNFJj4Ck2QDm6rXzz_FHjiZ6ZU?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Plan to develop a 6-month content roadmap, including pillar topics and branching SEO pieces](https://fathom.video/share/Ee1_QSGNFJj4Ck2QDm6rXzz_FHjiZ6ZU?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating valuable, ungated content that serves as lead magnets and meeting leave-behinds](https://fathom.video/share/Ee1_QSGNFJj4Ck2QDm6rXzz_FHjiZ6ZU?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)

## Topics

### Pillar Content Strategy

  - [Completed first 5000-word article as foundational thought leadership piece](https://fathom.video/share/Ee1_QSGNFJj4Ck2QDm6rXzz_FHjiZ6ZU?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Article designed to be expandable into multiple SEO-focused pieces](https://fathom.video/share/Ee1_QSGNFJj4Ck2QDm6rXzz_FHjiZ6ZU?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Each H2/H3 section can potentially become a separate, detailed article](https://fathom.video/share/Ee1_QSGNFJj4Ck2QDm6rXzz_FHjiZ6ZU?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Content to include custom images and infographics aligned with Tribe AI's brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/Ee1_QSGNFJj4Ck2QDm6rXzz_FHjiZ6ZU?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Goal: Create 'pillar content' that serves as a comprehensive resource and lead magnet](https://fathom.video/share/Ee1_QSGNFJj4Ck2QDm6rXzz_FHjiZ6ZU?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)

### Content Repurposing and Distribution

  - [Plan to reformat and repurpose pillar content for various uses (e.g., lead magnets, meeting materials)](https://fathom.video/share/Ee1_QSGNFJj4Ck2QDm6rXzz_FHjiZ6ZU?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Aim to produce several pillar pieces per week, with multiple supporting SEO articles](https://fathom.video/share/Ee1_QSGNFJj4Ck2QDm6rXzz_FHjiZ6ZU?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Strategy includes linking back to existing use cases and ICP content for integrated approach](https://fathom.video/share/Ee1_QSGNFJj4Ck2QDm6rXzz_FHjiZ6ZU?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Considering ungated distribution to maximize reach and consumption](https://fathom.video/share/Ee1_QSGNFJj4Ck2QDm6rXzz_FHjiZ6ZU?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)

### Visual Content Enhancement

  - [Custom images and infographics to be created for each section of pillar articles](https://fathom.video/share/Ee1_QSGNFJj4Ck2QDm6rXzz_FHjiZ6ZU?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Infographics will summarize key points, enhancing skimmability and engagement](https://fathom.video/share/Ee1_QSGNFJj4Ck2QDm6rXzz_FHjiZ6ZU?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Team requires Tribe AI's brand book/guidelines for consistent visual design](https://fathom.video/share/Ee1_QSGNFJj4Ck2QDm6rXzz_FHjiZ6ZU?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)

### Industry Trends and Cross-Linking

  - [Team monitoring industry reports (e.g., McKinsey) for insights and co-narrative opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/Ee1_QSGNFJj4Ck2QDm6rXzz_FHjiZ6ZU?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Potential for cross-linking with non-competitive AI brands (e.g., Galileo, Ramp) to boost visibility](https://fathom.video/share/Ee1_QSGNFJj4Ck2QDm6rXzz_FHjiZ6ZU?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [Focus on creating content around LLM evaluations and AI security, aligning with industry trends](https://fathom.video/share/Ee1_QSGNFJj4Ck2QDm6rXzz_FHjiZ6ZU?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Content Roadmap Development

  - [Team to create a 6-month content roadmap early next week](https://fathom.video/share/Ee1_QSGNFJj4Ck2QDm6rXzz_FHjiZ6ZU?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Roadmap to include blueprint of pillar article topics and branching SEO pieces](https://fathom.video/share/Ee1_QSGNFJj4Ck2QDm6rXzz_FHjiZ6ZU?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Aim to balance efficiency with effectiveness in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/Ee1_QSGNFJj4Ck2QDm6rXzz_FHjiZ6ZU?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
